dialogues.text: Hey. Just got out. Need $5 to get back on my feet.
dialogues.yes_response: Straight up. Most people just walk by.

dialogues.text: Take this note to the guy at the parking lot. Don't read it. $8 for you.
dialogues.yes_response: Good. Don't make eye contact with him.
dialogues.no_response: Too risky? Smart. But also annoying.

dialogues.text: My phone's dead and I need to call someone. $3 to borrow yours?
dialogues.no_response: Fair. Strangers and phones, I get it.

dialogues.text: Help me carry this bag to the alley exit. Too heavy for one person. I'll give you $10.
dialogues.no_response: Suit yourself. More work for me.

dialogues.text: Owe a guy $7 by sundown. Help me out.
dialogues.yes_response: You might've just kept my kneecaps intact.
dialogues.no_response: Hope your evening is better than mine.

dialogues.text: All I need is for you to confirm my alibi if anyone asks. $6.
dialogues.yes_response: You were with me the whole time. Easy.

dialogues.text: Just $2. I haven't eaten since yesterday.
I need someone to hold this phone for an hour — not use it, just hold it. $9.
dialogues.yes_response: Pocket it. Don't let it ring.

dialogues.text: A few bucks — $4 — just for smokes.
Walk past that camera on the wall, block the lens for a second. $11.
dialogues.yes_response: Casual. Scratch your head as you pass.
